mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Biddle, June 24, 1863
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Biddle from the Head Quarters of the 5th Corps, discussing the unreliable mail service, military news, the lack of reinforcements from the government and the resulting frustration, and the weather.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2029
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
